title: peplis australis var. timeroyi
intro: Peplis australis var. timeroyi, also known as the River Peperwort or Yellow Water Pepperwort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Tropaeolaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peplis australis var. timeroyi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or using them as a tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
